source_jobs.title: Front Desk Officer
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT TAJIR

Tajir is a new way for stores to buy inventory. Through the Tajir app, stores can order whenever they want, receive on-demand delivery, and choose from the largest selection of products available. Combined with transparent and competitive prices, Tajir takes a process that took a dozen hours every week and reduces it to a few minutes.



For brands, Tajir ensures that products are always reliably stocked at stores. Brands enjoy higher margin sales with zero additional investment.



Since our launch, we became the first company for Pakistan funded by Y Combinator, raised seed capital and further financing from Kleiner Perkins, and — most importantly — have served over 100,000 stores.



Today, Tajir helps stores save money and boost sales. Our vision is to provide every store in Pakistan the essential services it needs to grow.




WHO WE ARE LOOKING FOR

 - 2–5 years of experience in office management

 - Minimum intermediate qualification.

 - Strong Urdu communication skills; good English comprehension

 - Presentable and confident in a front-facing role

 - Basic computer literacy (Sheets, Docs, WhatsApp, scanning/printing)

 - Comfortable working in a mixed-gender environment
   
   


WHAT YOU WILL DO

 - Welcome and guide visitors, candidates, and vendors.

 - Manage the reception area and keep the front desk tidy.

 - Answer and forward calls professionally.

 - Handle basic administrative tasks (filing, scanning, document management).

 - Coordinate interview schedules and support HR.

 - Manage mail, correspondence, and inter-department communication.

 - Keep front-desk supplies organized and stocked.

 - Provide general administrative support as needed.

source_jobs.title: Assistant Manager Taxation
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT TAJIR

Tajir is a new way for stores to buy inventory. Through the Tajir app, stores can order whenever they want, receive on-demand delivery, and choose from the largest selection of products available. Combined with transparent and competitive prices, Tajir takes a process that took a dozen hours every week and reduces it to a few minutes.



For brands, Tajir ensures that products are always reliably stocked at stores. Brands enjoy higher margin sales with zero additional investment.



Since our launch, we became the first company for Pakistan funded by Y Combinator, raised seed capital and further financing from Kleiner Perkins, and — most importantly — have served over 100,000 stores.



Today, Tajir helps stores save money and boost sales. Our vision is to provide every store in Pakistan the essential services it needs to grow.




WHO WE ARE LOOKING FOR

 - CA Finalist or ACCA.

 - Well-versed with the latest amendments in IFRS, IAS, and local tax laws.

 - Proficient in using Google Workspace, especially Google Sheets.

 - Strong ethical standards and high level of integrity.

 - Preferably 2 years of industry experience.




WHAT YOU WILL DO

 - Keep the team informed of all periodical changes in the taxation laws, their effect on the company's business, and execute changes.

 - Liaise with tax consultants for routine compliances, filing of appeals, pursuing pending cases, and seeking opinions on operational matters.

 - Establish and implement internal control policies to ensure adherence to taxation requirements by cross-functional teams.

 - File all periodical tax statements including income tax returns, sales tax returns (federal/provincial), advance income tax, and withholding tax statements.

 - Ensure timely payment of all withholding taxes as per law and issue regular alerts.

 - Work closely with the Payable and Procurement team on purchase returns and execute timely settlement of any debit/credit notes.

 - Reconcile input tax credit from invoice to FBR portal and issue timely alert for payment settlement from non-compliant vendors.

source_jobs.title: Category Executive
source_jobs.description:
Join the team behind the best category management in the industry and help every kiryana store stay refreshed and fully stocked, every single day. If this sounds like your passion, apply away!




ABOUT TAJIR

Tajir is a new way for stores to buy inventory. Through the Tajir app, stores can order whenever they want, receive on-demand delivery, and choose from the largest selection of products available. Combined with transparent and competitive prices, Tajir takes a process that took a dozen hours every week and reduces it to a few minutes.



For brands, Tajir ensures that products are always reliably stocked at stores. Brands enjoy higher margin sales with zero additional investment.



Since our launch, we became the first company for Pakistan funded by Y Combinator, raised seed capital and further financing from Kleiner Perkins, and — most importantly — have served over 100,000 stores.



Today, Tajir helps stores save money and boost sales. Our vision is to provide every store in Pakistan the essential services it needs to grow.




WHO WE ARE LOOKING FOR

 - Bachelor’s degree in any field.

 - Fresh graduates are encouraged to apply!

 - Experience working with Google Sheets/Excel.

 - Comfortable with extensive travelling.

 - Excellent communication and interpersonal skills.

 - Able to learn quickly and take initiative.

 - Thrives in fast-paced, high-growth environments.




WHAT YOU WILL DO

 - Travel extensively across Pakistan for vendor negotiations, market visits, and procurement-related activities.

 - Procure and ensure availability of inventory while building strong supplier relationships.

 - Forecast demand, manage purchase cycles, and prevent stockouts/overstocking.

 - Monitor margins and control pricing.

 - Analyze dashboards and reports to drive category performance.

 - Recommend product additions or delistings based on sales insights.

 - Align suppliers with Tajir’s mission, share performance reports, and track target achievement.

notes: No tech roles posted, ops-heavy with focus on inventory management and store operations
